steps.title: Identify the sides
steps.content: In a right triangle, $\sin\theta=\dfrac{\text{opposite}}{\text{hypotenuse}}$. From the figure, the side opposite $x^\circ$ divided by the hypotenuse evaluates to about $0.6956$.

steps.title: Identify the answer
steps.content: So $\sin y^\circ$ (or $\sin x^\circ$) $= 0.6956$. The answer is .6956.
